title: feat(ibg-repository): repository proposal review package & draft-PR metadata (IBG-1 PR C)
intent: Add the capability for IBG to transform a validated RepositoryChangeProposal into a complete, deterministic, human-reviewable package: a review summary builder (ordered structured sections from canonical proposal facts), a DraftPullRequestPackage (advisory PR metadata — branch_name = proposal.proposed_branch, caller-supplied target_branch defaulting to main, ref-shape validated WITHOUT touching git), a RepositoryReviewBundle (a derived artifact embedding canonical serializations of the proposal, draft-PR metadata, an optional IBG ReviewPackage, optional normalized workspace metadata, and a provenance reference plus optional VERIFIED full lineage), and a deterministic export layer (dict/JSON/markdown + stable hash). Review artifacts only — no GitHub, no git execution, no repository mutation, no authority. Independently mergeable: PR B is a SOFT, serialization-only dependency (workspace metadata accepted as None, a validated Mapping, or an object exposing to_canonical_dict()); nothing here imports PR B.
behavior_change: Adds additive review-packaging modules under the existing services/api/app/ibg_repository/ package plus their tests. No existing runtime path imports them; no existing behavior, public API surface, schema, authority, or governance changes. Pure packaging/serialization: no git, no network, no filesystem writes, no GitHub.

diff_articulation.what_changed: Creates review_summary_builder.py (normalize_review_sections rejecting duplicate headings; build_review_summary emitting fixed ordered sections from canonical proposal facts; build_review_title/build_changed_file_summary), draft_pull_request_package.py (DraftPullRequestPackage advisory metadata; branch_name pinned to proposal.proposed_branch, caller target_branch default main, both ref-validated without git; CBSP21 packet reference by patch_id + hash), repository_review_bundle.py (RepositoryReviewBundle derived artifact; normalize_workspace_metadata adapter accepting None/Mapping/to_canonical_dict-object, rejecting other objects/non-string/unrecognized keys, dropping the environment-specific worktree_path, deterministically sorting nested collections; provenance reference always preserved and full lineage embedded ONLY when a governed provenance object is supplied AND its computed hash matches evidence_provenance_hash, fail-closed on mismatch), and repository_review_export.py (deterministic to_dict/to_json/to_markdown + stable_review_hash rendered from the single canonical dict). __init__ additively re-exports the new API; conftest gains a make_proposal fixture. A constitutional-invariant test asserts the new modules reference no subprocess/network/GitHub and do not import PR B's git_runner/worktree_builder.
diff_articulation.why_not_redundant: No review-package / draft-PR-metadata / review-bundle / deterministic-export capability existed. PR A added proposal contracts and PR B added worktree isolation; neither packages a proposal into a human-reviewable artifact. The existing body-geometry ReviewPackage is REUSED (embedded via to_dict()), not duplicated. This is a new, distinct capability boundary (review packaging) that did not previously exist, and it is deliberately built without a hard dependency on PR B so it can merge independently while PR B #216 is under review.

commands_run: python -m pytest tests/ibg_repository/ -q  ->  all passed (PR A + PR C together)

python -m pytest tests/ibg_repository/ --cov=app.ibg_repository.review_summary_builder --cov=app.ibg_repository.draft_pull_request_package --cov=app.ibg_repository.repository_review_bundle --cov=app.ibg_repository.repository_review_export  ->  >=98% per new module

files.intent: Additively re-export the PR C review-package public API.
Deterministic structured review sections from a proposal.
Derived review bundle + workspace-metadata adapter + provenance handling.
Add a shared make_proposal fixture for PR C tests.
Bundle assembly, workspace adapter, provenance verification, no-authority regression.
Document the complete review artifact pipeline.
Per-PR CBSP21 manifest for PR C.

architecture_scan.acknowledgement_notes: Additive, pure packaging/serialization. No git/GitHub/network/filesystem-write/authority. Soft (serialization-only) dependency on PR B; no PR B import. Read-only inspection API is deferred to PR D.
